name: Browser Use
description: AI-powered browser automation via the Browser Use Cloud API (v3). Dispatch natural-language tasks to a stealth Chromium browser driven by an LLM agent (Claude Opus / Sonnet, Gemini 3 Flash). Useful for safe URL detonation, phishing analysis, OSINT collection on portals without an API, and credential validation behind residential proxies.
author: Cortex XSOAR Community
